title: CMD.CHN.001.DSH.SYNCHRONIZE_SCORE — Apply a score recomputation to the dashboard
description: Payload of the SYNCHRONIZE_SCORE command. Issued by POL.CHN.001.DSH.ON_SCORE_RECOMPUTED in response to BNK.RLVR.RVT.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE_RECOMPUTED. Handled by AGG.CHN.001.DSH.BENEFICIARY_DASHBOARD. Internal command — never exposed via HTTP, never emits a domain event (the dashboard is a read-side view, not an authoritative source). Idempotent on trigger.event_id over a 30-day window. Stale events (trigger.recomputed_at older than the persisted score_recomputed_at) are acked-and-dropped to preserve monotonicity (INV.DSH.003).

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reliever participation case identifier.

event_id.description: IDEMPOTENCY KEY. Identifier of the upstream BNK.RLVR.RVT.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE_RECOMPUTED that triggered this command.

score_value.description: New current behavioural score (numerical, model-defined range).

delta_score.description: Score delta vs. the previous evaluation. Optional — passed through for observability.

recomputed_at.description: MONOTONICITY CHECK. Upstream computation_timestamp. Rejected (STALE_EVENT) when older than the aggregate's persisted score_recomputed_at.

model_version.description: Active scoring model version. Passed through for observability — the dashboard does not re-derive anything from the score, so model_version is informational only.
